title: BIG4 Ingenia Holidays Cairns Coconut
description: Bright units with kitchenettes in an upscale resort offering 2 pools & a spa, plus a water park.
hotelDescription:
Set among tropical gardens, this relaxed, upscale resort is 8 km from both Cairns Esplanade Lagoon and the Cairns Aquarium, and 13 km from Cairns Airport.
 Bright, airy apartments feature kitchenettes and living areas, plus TVs, free Wi-Fi and terraces. Upgraded units add whirlpool tubs.
 Amenities consist of a water park, 2 hot tubs and 2 outdoor pools with waterslides, as well as tennis courts, a basketball court and a kids' play area. There's also a casual restaurant and a cafe, plus a gym, a spa and relaxed gardens with BBQ facilities. Parking is included. Breakfast is available for a surcharge.

title: Crystal Cascades Holiday Park
description: Laid-back resort offering an outdoor pool & rainforest views, plus a kids' playground.
address: The Rocks Rd, Redlynch QLD 4870, Australia
hotelDescription:
Flanked by rainforest, this laid-back resort set 5 km off Highway 91 is 7 km from Goomboora Park and 5 km from the Crystal Cascades waterfall.
 The unfussy studios and 1- to 2-bedroom chalets provide kitchenettes, flat-screen TVs and furnished decks. Family chalets offer bunk beds.
 Amenities include an outdoor pool, a BBQ area and a kids' playground. Area excursions can be arranged.
